name: CommunityConnect
description: Connecting volunteers with local nonprofits and community projects. Find meaningful opportunities to give back in your neighborhood.

name: ImpactTracker
description: Track and visualize the real world impact of your charitable giving. See how your donations are making a difference in communities worldwide.

name: GreenSteps
description: Small daily actions for a more sustainable lifestyle. Set goals, build eco friendly habits, and join a community committed to positive change.
